title: Alacrity Lite
description: a lightweight version of my Alacrity resource pack
body:
Alacrity full version: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/alacrity

This is a light version of the resource pack, it does not have custom models, random textures, connected textures and much more. However, it is fully "classic", like the good old texture packs. And most importantly, the lite version eats much less FPS. 

Acknowledgments
- Some textures are from EpicAdventures resource pack (with permission): 
www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/epic-adventures-by-toby109tt-x32/ (Thanks to Toby109tt for letting me use his textures until I make my own)
Details in credits.txt inside pack .zip
- Some of the paintings are based on the work of VladimirVood: https://www.artstation.com/voodarius (Thanks to Vladimir for permission to use his awesome work)

 

Terms of use

You can, using my resource pack:
- Enjoy it.
- Record videos, take pictures with your friends, and upload them to any resource you like (it's a good idea to leave a link to the source)

You can't:
- Re-hosting this resource pack to any other websites (it's ok if you place a link to my official download sources)
- Use any part of this resource pack in other projects
If in doubt, you can always reach me on Discord
